task: Advanced high-value task: Flow Cytometry Gating Reproducibility Budget-Constrained Fix Plan. Scenario: a senior technical lead needs to decide whether to hold, release, retest, or redesign based only on supplied evidence for flow cytometry gating reproducibility. Embedded packet: Records: R1 gate_range_pct=36 viability_pct=62 analyst_count=3; R2 gate_range_pct=45 viability_pct=58 analyst_count=6; R3 gate_range_pct=31 viability_pct=73 analyst_count=2. Remediation options: O1 changes gate_range_pct by -12% cost=74000; O2 changes viability_pct by -18% cost=92800; O3 changes analyst_count by -25% cost=53200; max_budget=117600. Rules and constraints: gate range>5 points needs harmonization; viability<80 flags sample quality; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: evaluate whether the supplied remediation options are relevant, affordable, and sufficient to change the final decision. Deliver flow_gating_3.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
